title: Archipelago (CI Assistant Mod)
body:
NOTE: Archipelago is designed to be used on the [Cobblemon Islands Server!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-island)

Archipelago, the Cobblemon Islands Assistant Mod, Made by the Players, for the Players!

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d103e8e3e49e436eb2a3e2d7d11abeb7d98e1fc.png)

Archipelago adds various buttons and tweaks to make your experience on the Islands a lot easier!

Adds the following buttons to the inventory screen:
- Daycare
- Shop
- GTS
- PC
- Realms
- Pokebuilder
- Wondertrade
- Stonecutter
- Anvil
- Balloons
- Vehicles
- Kits
- RSW
- Mailbox
- Trainercard
- Battlepass
- Daily Rewards
- Workbench
- Ender chest
- 3 Home Buttons, that can be set to any home!

Buttons can be configured inside of the Mod Menu, accessible via Esc > Mods > Archipelago (Or the options button on the bottom right of the inventory)

New in 1.2.0: You can now create custom buttons that run any command!

The mod also adds a hotkey for the ./feed command (Useable by ranked players only.)
Additional hotkeys are also added for the checkegg command.

New in 1.5.0: Support for viewing skin tokens inside of the inventory!

New in 1.7.0: Item Frame Skin Token Display!
The new item frame feature allows you to display Pokémon Skin Tokens directly in the world! By placing specific blocks behind or below the note block the item frame is placed upon, you can customize the Pokémon's evolution stage, form, pose, and even its shiny status.
Placing an Iron Block, Gold block or Diamond Block below the instrument block will change the Pokémon's evolution

Instruments:

default -> Forms
- BIT -> Mega Form 1
- XYLOPHONE -> Mega Form 2 (E.g. Mega Y)
- COW_BELL -> Mega Form 3 (E.g. Mega Z)
- Changing the Note block's pitch will cycle a Pokémon's pose!

The mod only uses commands provided by the server itself. So it is not useable in single-player, and completely safe to use!

This mod is not affiliated with Cobblemon Islands officially! It's a fan-made project! Please do not direct any critique or bugs towards CI Staff!
If you have any issues or suggestions with the mod, feel free to contact me on Discord!
